criteria.name: AI-Powered Music Generation
criteria.description: Ability to generate original music compositions using artificial intelligence, including the capacity to create full songs from text prompts or other inputs.

criteria.name: Customization Options
criteria.description: The degree to which users can customize generated music, including genre selection, tempo adjustment, mood settings, and instrument choices.

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface, making it accessible for both beginners and professional musicians.

criteria.name: Audio Quality
criteria.description: The quality of the generated music tracks, including clarity, fidelity, and overall professional sound.

criteria.name: Royalty-Free Music
criteria.description: Whether the generated music can be used for commercial purposes without copyright concerns.

criteria.name: AI Music Learning
criteria.description: The capability of the app to provide personalized music learning experiences, track progress, and offer real-time feedback.

criteria.name: Stem Separation
criteria.description: Ability to separate audio tracks into individual instrument stems using AI for remixing and sampling.
